data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be Tripled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Mission Normal x3: 7/31 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 8/4 (Fri) 6:59 PM (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard x3: 8/4 (Fri) 7:00 PM – 8/7 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
